div.div:
STRAT-NNN.md
---------------------
strat_id: STRAT-001
source_rfe: RHAIRFE-1234
jira_key: RHAISTRAT-400
status: Draft
---------------------
Business Need
(verbatim from RFE)
Strategy
(filled by /strat.refine)
